name: Can I get money if an AI referral from my NY firm cost me my case?
description: Recoverable if negligence proven; focus on economic damages in NY.

mainEntity.name: Can I get money if an AI referral from my NY firm cost me my case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Recoverable if negligence proven; focus on economic damages in NY.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if malpractice proven, damages include lost settlement value and fees paid. New York caps non-economic damages. Key factors: (1) But-for causation; (2) Expert testimony on AI standards; (3) Mitigation efforts. Calculate economic losses precisely. Hire a quant expert for case valuation.
